amendment.description: To modify the number of medals won by Team USA.

vote.text: Amendment SA 4302 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Amendment SA 4302 proposed by Senator Moreno for Senator Klobuchar. To modify the number of medals won by Team USA.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4302 proposed by Senator Moreno for Senator Klobuchar.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 4302 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.
